description: Maps Part 11 clauses to the audit events that evidence them in a MakerChecker bundle. This is a control-to-clause crosswalk, not a certification; an assessor confirms posture against their own validated scope.

clauses.title: Validation of systems to ensure accuracy, reliability, and the ability to discern invalid or altered records
clauses.requirement: The system must be able to discern invalid or altered records.
clauses.note: Partial: the hash chain lets any altered record be discerned (verification fails at the altered seq). Full computerised-system validation is the operator's process.

clauses.title: Limiting system access to authorized individuals
clauses.requirement: Only authorized roles may perform an action; unauthorized actions are refused.
clauses.note: Deny-by-default grants; a refused unauthorized action records enforcement.blocked / skill_not_granted.

clauses.title: Secure, computer-generated, time-stamped audit trails recording operator entries and actions
clauses.requirement: Record operator actions with secure, time-stamped, computer-generated entries that do not obscure prior records.
clauses.note: Each event is time-stamped (occurredAt) and append-only; nothing overwrites a prior record.

clauses.title: Operational system checks to enforce permitted sequencing of steps and events
clauses.requirement: High-risk steps may proceed only in the permitted sequence (e.g. after a required approval).
clauses.note: A high-risk skill cannot run before its gate; out-of-sequence attempts record high_risk_requires_gate.

clauses.title: Authority checks to ensure only authorized individuals can use the system and perform the operation at hand
clauses.requirement: Only an authorized, identified individual may decide a gated action.
clauses.note: The decider's identity is recorded; the requester cannot self-approve (segregation enforced).

clauses.title: Signature manifestations — printed name of the signer, date and time, and meaning of the signature
clauses.requirement: A signed record carries the signer, the time, and the meaning of the signature.
clauses.note: approval.decided carries the decider, the decision (meaning), the reason, and occurredAt (time).

clauses.title: Signature/record linking — signatures linked to their records so they cannot be excised, copied, or transferred
clauses.requirement: An electronic signature is permanently bound to the record it signs.
clauses.note: The approval event is hash-chained into the same tamper-evident record as the action it authorizes; it cannot be moved without breaking verification.
